cheque_bounce_138.summary: A cheque issued to repay a personal/friendly hand loan was dishonoured.
A buyer's cheque against a supplier's invoice for goods was dishonoured.
A tenant's cheque covering accumulated rent arrears bounced.
A landlord's cheque refunding the security deposit after vacating bounced.
An employer's cheque for unpaid salary / full-and-final settlement was dishonoured.
A seller's cheque refunding token/advance money for a cancelled property deal bounced.
A client's cheque for completed freelance/professional services was dishonoured.
The buyer's cheque for the balance price of a used vehicle bounced.
A cheque paying a contractor for completed civil/renovation work was dishonoured.
An institute's refund cheque after a withdrawn admission bounced.
A consolidated cheque towards instalments owed to a private lender was dishonoured.
A settlement cheque on exit from a small business arrangement bounced.
A cheque against goods supplied on credit to a retail shop was dishonoured.
A cheque for the balance payment of purchased machinery/equipment bounced.

out_of_scope.summary: User asks whether they will win their pending court case.
User asks whether they should sue their builder for delay.
User asks for a divorce petition to file in family court.
User wants a mutual-consent divorce settlement drafted.
User asks for a bail application for a relative in custody.
User asks for an anticipatory bail application.
User asks for a will/testament to be drafted.
User asks for an FIR/police complaint to be drafted.
User wants a Public Interest Litigation drafted.
User wants a reply to a GST show-cause notice from the tax department.
User asks the assistant to appear or argue for them in court.
User asks what a court judgment means for their case.
User asks for a property sale deed / conveyance deed.
User asks how much compensation they can get for a faulty product.
User asks their chances in a cheque bounce case and what strategy to use.
User asks how to fight their termination and what tactics work.
User wants a 5-year registered commercial lease deed for Bengaluru.
User wants an income tax appeal drafted against an assessment order.
User wants a reply to a trademark examination objection.
User asks the assistant to verify whether a property's title is clear.

leave_license_mh.summary: Owner licenses a 2BHK flat in Andheri West, Mumbai to a salaried couple for 11 months; society intimation and maintenance terms included.
Retired teacher licenses a semi-furnished 1BHK in Kothrud, Pune to an IT professional; 11-month term with a three-month lock-in.
Homeowner licenses one furnished room with shared kitchen in a Thane flat to a postgraduate student as paying-guest style accommodation.
Shop owner licenses a ground-floor 250 sq ft shop on Gokhale Road, Thane to a kirana store proprietor; commercial use only.
Private limited startup licenses a 600 sq ft office in Baner, Pune for its registered office; 36-month term with annual escalation.
Owner licenses the ground floor of a Nashik bungalow with garden access to a retired bank officer couple for 22 months.
Flat in Vashi, Navi Mumbai licensed with one covered stilt parking slot included; licensee a shipping executive on an 11-month term.
IT company licenses a furnished 3BHK in Powai, Mumbai as residence for its vice-president; company pays fee and deposit, employee occupies.
Manufacturing company licenses a furnished 2BHK in Hinjawadi, Pune as a guest house for visiting engineers; housekeeping by licensee.
Apparel retail chain licenses a main-road showroom in Sitabuldi, Nagpur with signage rights; 60-month term and six-month lock-in.
Dentist licenses a commercial unit in Borivali West, Mumbai for a dental clinic; municipal permissions are the licensee's responsibility.
NRI owner working in Dubai licenses her furnished Bandra flat to an expatriate manager; fee payable to her NRO account.
Chartered accountant relocating from Delhi to Pune takes a furnished 2BHK in Wakad on license; police intimation clause emphasised.
Logistics company licenses a small godown in Bhiwandi, Thane district for storage; fire-safety compliance is the licensee's responsibility.

legal_notice_money_recovery.summary: A Pune auto-components supplier's invoices to a Mumbai distributor remain unpaid ninety days beyond agreed credit terms despite repeated reminders.
A hand loan given to a college friend in Mumbai for a medical emergency has not been repaid despite repeated promises.
A marketing executive who resigned from a Thane company is owed two months' salary and reimbursements; HR has stopped responding.
A homeowner paid a Nashik furniture workshop a large advance for modular furniture that was never delivered or refunded.
A freelance graphic designer in Mumbai completed a branding project for a startup; her invoices have been ignored for months.
A Nagpur landlord seeks four months of unpaid rent (money claim only) from a tenant who vacated without settling dues.
A Navi Mumbai co-operative housing society demands long-pending maintenance arrears from a flat owner who ignores bills and reminders.
A tenant who vacated a Pune flat after due notice has not received the refundable security deposit despite handing over possession.
An Aurangabad civil contractor's final bill for completed interior work is withheld by the developer without raising any defect.
A Delhi coaching institute cancelled a batch but refuses to refund the admission and tuition fees paid in advance.
A Jaipur caterer took a substantial advance for a wedding, failed to provide the services, and refuses to return the money.
An Ahmedabad transport operator is owed freight charges for multiple consignments carried on credit for a textile consignor.
A retiring partner of a Kolhapur trading firm has not been paid the settlement amount recorded in the retirement deed.
A Nagpur pharmaceutical distributor supplied medicines on credit to a chemist who has defaulted on the agreed running account.

legal_notice_landlord_tenant.summary: Tenant of a 1BHK flat in Andheri, Mumbai has not paid rent for months; landlord demands arrears and vacant possession.
Pune landlord requires the flat for his son's family after marriage; notice to quit month-to-month tenancy.
Leave-and-licence for a Thane flat expired; licensee continues in occupation without renewal; landlord demands handover of possession.
Nagpur shop tenant sublet part of the premises to a third party without the landlord's written consent; termination notice.
Nashik tenant carried out unauthorised structural alterations damaging the premises; landlord demands restoration and possession.
Bengaluru apartment tenant habitually pays rent weeks late despite repeated reminders; landlord terminates the tenancy.
Delhi market shop tenant is in arrears of rent and maintenance charges; landlord demands payment and possession.
Tenant vacated a Mumbai flat and handed over keys; landlord has not refunded the security deposit despite reminders.
Thane landlord returned only part of the deposit, deducting arbitrary painting and repair charges; tenant demands the balance.
Pune landlord disconnected water and electricity to pressure the tenant to vacate; tenant demands immediate restoration.
Kolhapur landlord accepts cash rent but refuses to issue rent receipts; tenant demands receipts for all payments made.
Hyderabad landlord changed the locks while the tenant was travelling; tenant demands restoration of possession and belongings.
Delhi landlord and brokers repeatedly visit and threaten the tenant's family to force vacation; tenant demands they desist.
Bengaluru landlord enters the flat without notice and shows it to prospective buyers; tenant demands cessation of interference.

consumer_complaint_cpa2019.summary: A Mumbai homemaker's front-load washing machine failed within warranty; the manufacturer's service centre made three failed repair visits and refuses replacement.
A Pune student paid online for a laptop on an e-commerce marketplace; the order was never delivered and refund requests were ignored.
A Nagpur schoolteacher's health insurance claim for hospitalisation was repudiated citing pre-existing disease despite full disclosure at proposal stage.
A Thane buyer paid most of the consideration for a 1BHK flat; the builder has delayed possession well beyond the agreed date despite repeated demands.
A Nashik businessman's car came back from authorised servicing with engine damage; the workshop denies responsibility and demands further charges.
A Latur student paid full fees for a JEE coaching batch the institute later cancelled; the institute refuses any refund citing a no-refund clause.
A Delhi consultant's flight was cancelled by the airline, which has not refunded the fare months later despite repeated written complaints.
An Aurangabad patient was billed far above the agreed package rate for surgery; the hospital withheld discharge papers until excess payment, a deficiency in service.
A Mumbai senior citizen's savings account was debited with unexplained service charges; the bank failed to reverse them despite written complaints.
A Kolhapur couple's sofa set arrived with cracked frames and torn upholstery; the dealer ignored replacement requests throughout the warranty period.
A Solapur shopkeeper's new smartphone was dead on arrival; both the retailer and the brand refuse the promised DOA replacement.
A Navi Mumbai IT employee paid for an annual gym membership; the branch shut within a month and the operator refuses any refund.
A Bengaluru freelancer paid annual broadband charges in advance; the provider disconnected service within weeks and refuses refund or restoration.

affidavit_general.summary: Pune software engineer's name is spelt differently in passport and Aadhaar; affidavit affirms both names denote one and the same person for passport reissue.
Nagpur account holder's PAN carries initials while bank records show the expanded name; bank seeks a one-and-the-same-person affidavit for KYC updation.
Chennai homemaker appears under maiden and married names across property papers; affidavit confirms one and the same person for mutation entry.
Mumbai tenant lacks a utility bill in his own name; affidavit of current residence required for a new LPG gas connection.
Family recently shifted to Thane; deponent swears an address affidavit to support voter ID enrolment at the new residence.
Nashik student took a year after HSC to prepare for engineering entrance examinations; college demands a gap-year affidavit at admission.
Delhi graduate explains a two-year break before post-graduation caused by a parent's prolonged illness; university requires a sworn explanation.

params.gap_reason: caring for an ailing family member

affidavit_general.summary: Mumbai investor misplaced original share certificates during house shifting; the company's registrar requires an affidavit before issuing duplicates.
Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar candidate lost his SSC marksheet in transit; the divisional board requires an affidavit before issuing a duplicate.
Bengaluru flat owner cannot trace the original sale deed; affidavit needed to obtain a certified copy and complete bank loan refinance.
Solapur farmer declares modest annual family income to support his daughter's state post-matric scholarship application.
Lucknow applicant declares gross annual family income for an EWS certificate; the tehsil office requires a sworn income affidavit.
Kolhapur applicant's school records carry no date of birth entry; affidavit affirms his correct date of birth for passport issuance.
Retired Jalgaon teacher's service book records a clerical error in date of birth; affidavit states the correct date for pension processing.

employment_offer_termination.summary: Pune IT services company offers a software engineer role on six-month probation with a sixty-day notice period.
Auto-components manufacturer at Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar (Aurangabad) appoints a production supervisor at its MIDC Waluj plant.
Bengaluru fintech startup offers a senior product manager role at a senior CTC band with ninety-day notice.
Mumbai BPO hires a customer support executive for a night-shift voice process at entry-level pay.
Hyderabad pharmaceutical company offers a quality-assurance chemist position at its Genome Valley facility.
Nagpur retail chain appoints a store manager for its new Sitabuldi outlet on three-month probation.
Goa beach resort offers a front-office manager role ahead of the tourist season.
Mumbai media house terminates a marketing executive after a divisional shutdown, offering pay in lieu of notice.
Pune logistics firm declines to confirm an operations trainee whose probation performance fell short of targets.

params.termination_reason: non-confirmation of services during the probation period

employment_offer_termination.summary: Thane engineering unit dismisses a storekeeper for stock pilferage established in a domestic inquiry.

params.termination_reason: misconduct established in a domestic inquiry

employment_offer_termination.summary: Nashik FMCG distributor terminates a sales representative for continued unauthorised absence despite written warnings.
Gurugram SaaS company retrenches a backend engineer amid funding-driven restructuring, with pay in lieu of notice.
Chennai IT services firm ends a junior developer's service during probation for non-confirmation.

params.termination_reason: non-confirmation of services during the probation period

employment_offer_termination.summary: Kolkata trading company terminates an accounts assistant for misconduct established in an internal inquiry.

params.termination_reason: misconduct established in a domestic inquiry

mou_two_parties.summary: A Pune industrial-automation firm and a Mumbai design studio record intent to jointly bid for factory retrofit projects across Maharashtra.
A Nagpur infrastructure contractor and a Mumbai construction company explore a joint venture for PWD road tenders in Vidarbha.
An Aurangabad FMCG manufacturer and a Nashik distributor record intent for snacks distribution across North Maharashtra districts.
A listed Mumbai company's CSR foundation and a Pune NGO agree on a youth skilling programme in Pimpri-Chinchwad.
A Hyderabad software company and a Kolhapur auto-parts manufacturer record intent to license a production-planning software suite.
A Pune engineering college and a Chakan auto components company set up internships, plant visits, and joint student projects.
A Kolhapur foundry and a Chennai pump manufacturer record intent for exclusive supply of graded castings pending a definitive agreement.
A Nashik entrepreneur and a Bengaluru cafe chain explore a franchise outlet, with due diligence and a pilot before any franchise agreement.
A Mumbai-based MD physician and a Thane multi-speciality clinic agree on weekly OPD rotations and referral protocols.
A freelance event producer and a Pune cultural trust co-organise a three-day Diwali trade fair at a city exhibition ground.
A freelance architect and a Navi Mumbai co-working operator record an understanding for dedicated studio desks and shared meeting credits.
A daughter returning from Ahmedabad and the family's Solapur textile company record a phased management transition understanding.
A first-time founder and a Mumbai university incubator record an understanding on mentoring, seed support, and workspace access.

partnership_deed_1932.summary: Two college friends in Pune formalise a kirana-and-general-stores retail trading partnership in Kothrud, contributing unequal capital.
Three siblings open a Maharashtrian thali restaurant in Nashik pooling family savings; the eldest manages day-to-day operations.
Two Chartered Accountants in Mumbai's Fort area form a consultancy partnership offering taxation, audit support and compliance services.
Three partners set up a garment manufacturing unit in Bhiwandi doing power-loom job work and export stitching orders.
Two partners in Nagpur run a goods transport service with three trucks plying the Nagpur-Raipur route.
Three partners take an FMCG distribution agency for Kolhapur district covering retail outlets across five talukas.
Two home chefs in Thane start a cloud-kitchen restaurant business on delivery apps; one contributes kitchen equipment as capital.
Two teachers in Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar partner to run a JEE/NEET coaching and educational consultancy near the railway station.
A long-running family hardware retail store in Indore is formalised as a partnership when the founder's son-in-law joins with fresh capital.
Two friends in Jaipur formalise an e-commerce retail trading business reselling handicrafts on national marketplaces.
Three partners in Bengaluru launch a unisex salon services chain, starting with two outlets in Koramangala and HSR Layout.
Three partners in Surat form a firm to take civil construction subcontracts for plastering and tiling works.

reply_to_legal_notice.summary: Pune businessman replies that the friendly loan demanded was repaid in full by bank transfer months ago; bank statement annexed; demands withdrawal of the notice.
Nashik trader withheld invoice payment because supplied machine components were defective and rejected on inspection; counter-claims testing and storage costs.
Mumbai resident denies a stale 2019 hand-loan demand as time-barred and never acknowledged; no liability admitted.
Thane tenant contests a quit notice that gives less than the notice period stipulated in the registered leave and licence agreement.
Nagpur tenant denies alleged rent default, relying on rent receipts and UPI records; says the notice is a pretext to extract higher rent.
Delhi tenant disputes the landlord's claimed bona fide requirement, pointing to two vacant flats the landlord owns in the same building.
Aurangabad distributor says a blank security cheque was filled in and presented despite the account being fully settled; denies any legally enforceable debt.
Mumbai buyer stopped payment because the consignment was never delivered; denies liability for the dishonoured cheque and demands withdrawal of the notice.
Kolhapur borrower replies that the loan behind the dishonoured cheque was discharged in cash against a signed receipt before presentation.
Pune appliance dealer answers a consumer notice with service-visit records showing two free warranty repairs and an offered replacement the complainant refused.
Bengaluru electronics retailer denies deficiency in service, asserting physical damage from mishandling voided the warranty; technician's inspection report relied upon.
Mumbai developer replies that possession delay flowed from pandemic stop-work orders and falls within the agreement's grace period; denies refund liability.
Mumbai IT employer denies an ex-employee's claim for unpaid dues, annexing the signed full-and-final settlement and bank payment proof.
Pune manufacturer replies that the resigning engineer left without serving notice; dues stand lawfully adjusted against notice-pay recovery under the appointment letter.
